THE BOOK

A Portfolio Is Not a Plan.

Retire Right, Retire Now will show you how to turn your savings into a clear, coordinated retirement strategy — so you can stop worrying and start living.

WHAT'S INSIDE

What's Inside

The Retirement Money Map

A five-pillar framework connecting income, taxes, investments, healthcare, and legacy into one clear plan

Real Stories from Real Families

Who went from uncertainty to confidence using this proven approach

End-of-Chapter Exercises

So you can start building your plan as you read

AS SEEN & HEARD ON
"There's no award for being the wealthiest person in the cemetery."
— Mike Stevens
THE FRAMEWORK

The Retirement Money Map

Five pillars that work together to create your complete retirement strategy

Income

Sustainable retirement income streams

Investments

Strategic portfolio management

Taxes

Tax-efficient withdrawal strategies

Healthcare

Medical cost planning and protection

Legacy

Estate and inheritance planning

Get Your Free Chapter
YOUR PATH

Chapter Roadmap

1

Your Retirement, Your Terms

Why a portfolio isn't a plan and what's missing from most retirement strategies

2

Turning Savings Into Paychecks

Creating reliable income streams that last throughout retirement

3

The Hidden Power of Tax Planning

Tax-efficient withdrawal strategies and planning

4

Protect What You've Built

Strategic portfolio management for the retirement phase

5

Invest Smarter

Investment strategies that work in retirement

6

The Fee Drag

Understanding and minimizing investment costs

7

Health Isn't Just Wealth

Planning for medical costs and long-term care

8

Leave More Than Money

Estate planning and wealth transfer strategies

9

Retire with Clarity

Implementing your plan and working with professionals

Schedule a Consultation
"A portfolio is not a plan. This book is."
TESTIMONIALS

What Readers Are Saying

"

Finally, a retirement book that goes beyond 'save more money.' Mike's framework showed us exactly where our gaps were and how to fix them. We feel confident for the first time in years.

— Sarah and Tom Johnson, Retired Educators
"

I thought I had retirement figured out until I read this book. The healthcare chapter alone saved us from a huge blind spot in our planning.

— Michael Rodriguez, Age 58
"

The Retirement Money Map gave us a clear roadmap. No more guessing, no more worrying about whether we're doing the right things.

— Linda Chen, Recently Retired
"

We found $40,000 in tax savings by implementing the tax pillar strategies. The book paid for itself many times over.

— Robert and Janet Miller, Ages 62 & 59
"

Finally have peace of mind. The complete framework gave us confidence that we're not missing anything important in our retirement planning.

— David Thompson, Financial Engineer

ABOUT

About the Author

Mike Stevens

Mike Stevens shifted from pre-med to finance after his father Len passed away at 49, inspiring his mission to help families prepare for the unexpected.

As founder of Capital Wealth Advisors, Mike is a fiduciary advisor, radio and TV host, and board member dedicated to helping people retire with confidence. He lives in Utah with his family.

Connect with Mike on LinkedIn

Schedule a Consultation
FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Anyone approaching retirement or already retired who wants clarity on their financial future. If you've been diligent about saving but feel uncertain about your plan, this book is for you.

This book is all about practical action. Each chapter includes specific steps and exercises you can take to improve your retirement readiness immediately.

Not at all. The principles apply whether you have $100,000 or $1 million saved. Good planning is about percentages and strategies, not just dollar amounts.

Most retirement books focus on accumulation. This book focuses on the transition—how to turn your savings into sustainable income while managing taxes, healthcare costs, and market volatility.

The book is scheduled for release in Spring 2026. Sign up to get your free chapter and be notified when it's available for pre-order.

Yes, the book will be available in hardcover, paperback, e-book, and audiobook formats to suit your reading preference.

Your Retirement Starts Here
